name: psx-wealth-builder
description: Long-term wealth creation platform for Pakistan Stock Exchange investors

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @psx/api
scripts.seed: npm run build:packages && npm run seed --workspace @psx/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
